title: 11. Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD)
content:
11. Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD)

18. Code Review and Optimization
19. Familiarity with Agile Development
20. Basic Graphic Design

1. Wireframing
2. Prototyping
3. User Research
4. Interaction Design
